note: 1st-party deployment list = I0 contract-inventory ground truth. User-pre-sign surface = stETH / wstETH / WithdrawalQueueERC721 (cover); everything else is protocol infra / oracle / governance the user does not sign against pre-sign (exclude). Honest floor: as complete as the official page — a contract the page omits is still invisible.

contracts.name: stETH (Lido, proxy)
contracts.reason: user staking-token surface: submit / transferShares / transferSharesFrom

contracts.name: Lido (implementation)
contracts.reason: implementation behind the stETH proxy — users call the proxy (covered)

contracts.name: Staking Router (proxy)
contracts.reason: infra: node-operator-module routing; not a user pre-sign entry point

contracts.name: Withdrawal Vault (proxy)
contracts.reason: infra: protocol-internal ETH vault; no user pre-sign entry

contracts.name: Accounting Oracle (proxy)
contracts.reason: oracle: report submission by oracle committee, not users

contracts.name: LDO token
contracts.reason: standard ERC-20 governance token — erc20 standard adapter (not Lido-specific surface)

contracts.name: Dual Governance
contracts.reason: governance: proposal flow, not user pre-sign
